title: Legal Shield
summary: GoalOS legal, privacy, data, investment, and responsibility boundary.

title: Privacy Notice
summary: GoalOS does not want user data; static, no-account, no-tracking public site posture.

title: Zero User Data Boundary
summary: Do not submit personal, customer, confidential, regulated, credential, or trade-secret data.

title: Token & Investment Boundary
summary: No token sale, no investment offer, no profit promise, no user-fund authorization.

title: Responsible Use
summary: Lawful, bounded, public-safe, human-reviewed use only.

title: Security Boundary
summary: Default-deny, no public secrets, no unauthorized testing.

title: $AGIALPHA Public-Market Boundary
description: $AGIALPHA is not available from GoalOS. No sale, no support, no custody, no user funds.

title: Multi-Agent Institution Lab
description: Browser-local proof-governed multi-agent institution simulator with Evidence Docket download.

title: Proof Gradient Lab
description: Browser-local demonstration of Aim, Act, Prove, Evolve and the Selection Gate.

title: Evidence Docket Theatre
description: A browser-local proof room that turns public-safe claims into review-ready Evidence Dockets.

title: Proof-to-Action Command Room
description: Browser-local GoalOS demo: Objective to Evidence Docket to Governed Decision State to Action Graph to Chronicle to Capability Package.

title: Sovereign Experience Stream Lab
description: Proof becomes governed experience: browser-local GoalOS demo for experience streams, reward ledgers, router updates, temporal options, and human review.

title: Proof-Settlement Chronicle Lab
description: No ProofBundle, no settlement. Browser-local GoalOS proof-settlement simulation.

title: Falsification Gauntlet
summary: Strong claims survive baselines: browser-local claim-bound proof demo.

title: Proof Run 001 Execution Room
summary: The bridge from public-alpha architecture to the first real Evidence Docket.

title: Proof Experience Atlas
description: Unified browser-local path through the best GoalOS public demos.

title: Proof Mission Forge
description: Turn a public-safe objective into a Mission Contract, Claims Matrix, Evidence Docket plan, validator packet, and GitHub-ready issue draft.

title: Proof Mission Control
description: Turn public-safe proof missions into reviewable operating state.

title: External Reviewer Replay Room
description: Independent review path for Evidence Dockets, replay, baselines, validator notes, claim boundaries, and dissent.

title: Public Proof Ledger
description: Unified registry for GoalOS public proof surfaces, dockets, reports, review paths, and Proof Run 001 readiness.

title: Proof Run 001 Real Evidence Docket
summary: Repository-readiness Evidence Docket with gates, claims matrix, replay path, validator packet, and governed decision state.
